text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe lets out a quiet sigh. She looks a
little dejected...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I ordered some special coffee, but I just found
out the delivery is going to be massively
delayed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe remains dispirited for the rest of
the day. The delay must have come as quite the
shock...
